Type Method# Create_Impl

macOS 10.15+

```
static kern_return_t Create_Impl(uint64_t options, uint64_t capacity, uint64_t alignment, IOBufferMemoryDescriptor **memory);
```

[`ExpansionData`](/documentation/kernel/ioservice/expansiondata)[`reserved`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/reserved)[`+ Create`](/documentation/driverkit/iobuffermemorydescriptor/create)Creates a new memory buffer descriptor object in the current process space.[`+ Create_Invoke`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/3180451-create_invoke)[`- GetAddressRange`](/documentation/driverkit/iobuffermemorydescriptor/getaddressrange)Returns the address and length of the memory buffer.[`- getMetaClass`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/1574832-getmetaclass)[`+ SetLength_Invoke`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/3131492-setlength_invoke)[`- SetLength`](/documentation/driverkit/iobuffermemorydescriptor/setlength)Changes the length of the memory buffer.[`- SetLength_Impl`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/3131491-setlength_impl)[`- Dispatch`](/documentation/kernel/iobuffermemorydescriptor/3180452-dispatch)
